positive: A symmetrical, mystical lunar forest landscape illustration, rendered in a high-contrast linocut woodblock style. The central scene features stylized ancient flora, spiraling crescent moons, and ethereal forest spirits emerging from mist. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, forest teal, creamy ivory, and stark black ink, utilizing negative space for impact. The composition must be highly graphic, emphasizing clean, strong silhouettes and intricate, repeating patterns suitable for repeating textile print designs. Focus on geometric symmetry, decorative detail, and a central, arresting focal point. Cinematic lighting, graphic novel aesthetic, print resolution, highly detailed, zendesk design.
